name: desert next to a pyramid
description: I'm in a desert next to a pyramid
hints: You're next to the pyramid! There's a stone and a sign here. READ SIGN for clues.
GET STO to pick up the stone - it triggers machinery and reveals a door.
The stone is a Rosetta Stone fragment needed to read hieroglyphics. GO DOO to enter the pyramid.
GET STO triggers the pyramid door to open. GO DOO enters the pyramid (room 6). DIG here with shovel finds items. N=desert (1), W=pool area (3).

needs: Door with large keyhole (must be in room)
effects: Message: The right key could help (maybe).

notes: Pyramid entrance. GET STO triggers the door to open. The Rosetta Stone helps read hieroglyphics in room 15. DIG with shovel finds items. N=desert (1), W=pool (3).
